text.title: In-Issue Ad Format Library Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: 5k-subscriber newsletter running an 8-issue rotation across the 4 formats.

section.title: Setup
section.p: Solo operator runs a weekly newsletter with 5200 subscribers. Baseline CTR 3.2%, CVR 0.6%. Active product: $19/mo SaaS. Lead magnet: a free starter pack PDF.

list.item: dedicated_send (issue 6): CTR 5.8% but unsubscribe spike 0.9% (vs 0.2% baseline).
Promoted: mid_issue_case (highest CTR + CVR + no unsubscribe spike).
Demoted: top_banner (below_baseline; rotate out for the next 4 issues).
Cadence note: dedicated_send keeps its 1×/6 cap (good for revenue spike, but watch unsubscribe).

text.example: 5200 subs (≥500) + baseline available + product live → 4-format library + 8-issue plan with 1 'none' issue and dedicated_send 1×/6 → cadence caps respected → mid_issue_case promoted; APPROVE via run-the-checklist.
